description: Logic agent detects TODO and bare except
diff:
diff --git a/baz.py b/baz.py
index 555..666 100644
--- a/baz.py
+++ b/baz.py
@@ -1,2 +1,5 @@
-def foo(x):
-    return x
+def foo(x):
+    # TODO: handle None case
+    try:
+        return x + 1
+    except:
+        return 0

expected_issues.message: TODO present in newly added code.
Bare except detected; this can hide runtime errors.
